assertions.reason: The briefing payload includes many events with multiple linked article IDs, confirming related articles are being grouped into shared events.
evidence: Sample multi-article events: [{'id': 'evt-a08cbdf1eaa9cde6', 'title': 'Over 1,000 Diaspora leaders urge action against ‘Jewish-extremist terror in West Bank’', 'articleCount': 2, 'primaryCountry': 'PS'}, {'id': 'evt-8af760e84031668a', 'title': 'Sierra Leone – The unfinished business of the Agreement for National Unity', 'articleCount': 2, 'primaryCountry': 'SL'}, {'id': 'evt-d9ffc080e0e1ea9c', 'title': 'Sierra Leone – Protocols without action: who now collects the dead on the streets?', 'articleCount': 2, 'primaryCountry': 'SL'}]
server/eventStore.js lines 17, 90, and 199 implement entity-aware event grouping

assertions.reason: The briefing payload contains many events with extracted people and organization entities, and the correlation stage explicitly aggregates them into event enrichment.
evidence: GET /api/briefing returned entityRichEventCount=2270 out of eventCount=3373

Sample entity-rich events: [{'id': 'evt-cc2fbcfafc71c269', 'title': 'As Hezbollah rockets fall, emergency medics in Israel’s North work double shifts', 'people': [], 'organizations': ['Hezbollah'], 'primaryCountry': 'LB'}, {'id': 'evt-820d7fd201423372', 'title': 'Maccabi Tel Aviv keeps Euroleague Playoff hopes alive with win over Fenerbahce', 'people': ['Maccabi Tel Aviv', 'Euroleague Playoff'], 'organizations': [], 'primaryCountry': 'IL'}, {'id': 'evt-f2371c3b5f65808a', 'title': "Ousted Ben & Jerry's board chair sues Unilever, alleging defamation", 'people': ['Ousted Ben'], 'organizations': ["Ben & Jerry's board", 'Unilever,'], 'primaryCountry': 'IL'}]
server/pipeline/correlateEvents.js lines 93 and 116 aggregate entities and use them in event enrichment

frictions: Validation used the current cached briefing snapshot rather than forcing a new refresh, to respect the no-mutation boundary for this milestone run.
